title: Median annual total compensation by country (2024)
summary: Approximate median annual total compensation: Indonesia IDR 92.35M, Singapore SGD 79,200, Malaysia MYR 97,200, Vietnam VND 260M, Thailand THB 652,000. Wide variance at leadership levels across all markets.
methodology: Self-reported annual total compensation in local currency, converted to annual figures where needed. Medians calculated per country.
